aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited structured data and conversational content. While the NAP consistency is strong, the lack of rich schema and authority signals weakens AI visibility.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema with detailed business information.
Expand FAQ content with AI-friendly, conversational queries and answers.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not optimized and is invisible to Google AI, significantly impacting local search visibility.
critical_issues: Missing photos, posts, and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to additional local directories for increased visibility.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service explanations
Lack of Product or Service schema for specific HVAC offerings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Absence of rich schema limits AI understanding of the business.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries such as 'HVAC repair in Kansas City'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness schema with service details.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, expertise, and customer testimonials to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your Google Business Profile is not found, and your website lacks essential schema markup.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates rich schema, GBP optimization, and conversational content to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimized for AI are already capturing your market share. Act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: Boost Leads with Our AEO Strategy
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to enhance your AI visibility and attract more leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and drive more business your way.
